guidances.given_in: reiterated across recent calls, incl. Q4 FY26 (14 May 2026)
guidances.note: Management reiterated commitment to a USD 2 billion overall revenue milestone: 'our guidance overall, we remain committed to the 2 billion guidance and industrial and aftermarket have an important role to play as we move and progress towards the 2 billion milestone.'
INR700cr capex for a 50,000-engine capacity expansion (new lines within the existing Kagal plant) -- 'that's coming online by April of next year and 50,000 engines.'

INR1,400cr capex over the next two years for a further 20,000-engine capacity expansion (new building + new lines at the Kagal site, weighted toward HHP/high-horsepower and international-market engines) -- 'we are investing close to INR1,400 crores on that. So that will be our capital allocation for this next two years.'
Industrial segment delivered FY26 revenue of INR1,444cr, +22% YoY -- a completed full-year outcome, not a forward claim.
